ljdkj] mDr vf/fu;e dh /kjk 5 dh mi&/kjk (3) ds ijarqd }kjk iznÙk 'kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs gq,] mDr vf/dj.k }kjk vfrfjDr fjiksVZ izLrqr djus dh vof/ dks rkjh[k 30 uoEcj] 2013 rd dh vfrfjDr vof/ ds fy, c<+krh gS A ¹iQk- la- 17@1@2007&ch-,e-º m£oyk [kkrh] la;qDr lfpo (ihih) MINISTRY OF WATER RESOURCES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th September, 2013 S.O. 2939(E).— Whereas, the Krishna Water Disputes Tribunal (hereinafter referred to as the said Tribunal) was 4175 GI/2013 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. constituted on the 2nd April, 2004 vide notification number S.O. 451(E), dated the 2nd April, 2004, under section 4 of the Inter-State River Water Disputes Act, 1956 (33 of 1956) (hereinafter referred to as the said Act) for the adjudication of the water disputes regarding Inter-State river Krishna and river valley thereof; And whereas, the said Tribunal has submitted its report and decision under sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act on the 30th December, 2010; And whereas, the Central Government and the Party States of Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka and Maharashtra have preferred their respective references, to the said Tribunal under sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the said Act; And whereas, the said Tribunal was required to forward to the Central Government a further report under sub-section (3) of section 5 of the said Act on or before one year from 29th March, 2011; And whereas, on the request of the said Tribunal, the period of submission of further report under sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the said Act was extended from from time to time vide notifications number S.O. 653(E), dated the 29th March, 2012, S.O. 2339(E), dated the 28th September, 2012 and S.O. 916(E), dated the 2nd April, 2013 upto the 30th September, 2013; And whereas, the said Tribunal has again requested to extend the period of submission of further report under sub- section (3) of Section 5 of the said Act for a further period upto 30th November, 2013; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by the proviso to sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby extends the period of submision of further report by the said Tribunal for a further period upto 30th November, 2013. [F. No. 17/1/2007-BM] URVILLA KHATI, Jt. Secy. (PP) -- 2 of 2 --
